reviews.review_text: Brings back the nostalgia from theme hospital, a game i adored back when i was younger. I love the sillyness in it even at 36 years old. Definately give it a go if you enjoyed theme hospital back in the day.
Spiritual successor to the classic Theme Hospital, enjoyable game.
The game constantly crashes, I have tried all known "fixes" and it doesn't do anything! it's the "Unity" crash. It's a shame for the short time I play it, I love it.

Two Point Hospital is the kind of game where you say “I’ll just play for 30 minutes” and suddenly it’s 3AM.

Honestly, all the Two Point games make me lose track of time, but there’s something about this one specifically that always makes me come back. It’s been my comfort game for years and I still never get bored of it.

The humor is just so good; the puns, radio announcements, ridiculous illnesses, and overall vibe of the game just make it so charming. The graphics are cozy and fun to look at, but underneath all that, the gameplay is actually super engaging. You really have to think strategically with layouts, staffing, upgrades, finances, and managing the chaos when your hospital inevitably starts falling apart.

And somehow that chaos is part of the fun.

One minute you’re peacefully optimizing layouts and patient flow, the next minute your entire hospital is collapsing because your staff all decided to go on break at the same time, ghost patients are roaming the hallways, cleanliness is at an all-time low, you’re drowning in debt, and the whole hospital is one emergency away from total disaster.

It’s honestly one of the best management games out there and deserves way more hype. If you like cozy games, tycoon/management games, or games that completely consume your sense of time, this is absolutely worth playing.
very fun, mildly repetitive, and the income i kinda hard to predict and get a hang of, but overall fun asf. love how customizable everything is

I've unscrewed someoone's head, recovered elvis, slurped up ghosts. This game is funny. Not Theme hospital funny, but close. This game is what a 3D theme hospital would probably look like in the PC world. They could stand to be a little more offensive, because that's what made theme hospital funny.

Maybe I'm just spoiled because I played TPM before this, but god this game is soooo repetitive, which really is a shame! 
Even with moving to new locations to mix things up, I find myself just leaving the game running while I do something else because it takes so long with no input to get a 3 star hospital. Everything else has held up pretty good considering this game is getting up there in age. Love the dry humor too, but I just can't get past how bored I am playing this game. Get Two Point Museum instead, it's miles better! <3
It's a great hospital sim, reminiscent of Theme Hospital. I can easily loose hours at a time on this game
Fun and addictive game, but achivements are locked behind DLCs
Funny, irreverant, and engaging
If you remember the famous Theme Hospital, this is the evolution. Very funny but still chalengefull
Very chill, incredibly funny and easily replayable. 10/10.

I played Two Point Museum first, enjoyed it, and decided to play this one too. Hospital is clearly older with a less polished UI and graphics, but it is a better management game. It is much more challenging than Museum. Still on the easy side of tycoon style games but you do need to learn how to assign staff and manage the budget. I am not a huge fan of the way the campaign is organized (you keep building new hospitals from the ground up with only minor changes each level) but the game is charming and fun.

One of them games which doesn't take it's self seriously - It's funny and simple to get the hang off. I used to play the old style version of this as a kid and honestly this is just as good. Honestly great for a easy playing. Highly recommended.

Brilliant game. I first got into the series through Two Point Campus, so when Two Point Hospital went on sale along with some DLC, I decided to give it a try. I really enjoy the mix of challenge, humour, and personality. The pun-filled illness names, the patient animations, and small details like clowns arriving in tiny cars all add to its charm. It is very easy to lose hours playing without even noticing. Genuinely worth every penny and more.
El primero de la saga Two Point que probé y lo juego hace años. Muy recomendado y entretenido, se nota que está creado con dedicación. Muchos desafíos y objetivos distintos, el tiempo pasa volando.
I bought this game on sales to support the dev. Simply because Theme Hospital was my childhood. This game keeps the same fun and vibe of Theme Hospital. Thank you so much for bringing back memory.

DO NOT RUN ON LINUX FEDORA

On my Asus Zenbook it led to Kernel Panic twice - first on startup, which I thought was random, second time after several hours of playing and led to a boot wipeout (I had to redo the boot definitions to get back to Fedora or whatever).
For the few hours I played it the gameplay itself was generally fun. It was sometimes frustrating trying to understand how to perform some actions (firing people for example) and it could do better with explaining stuff. It also felt too 'diverse' and gender-amorphous for my taste, which has become just too exhausting in my opinion. I could still run it on my Windows system, but I've grown to despise windows and also despise even slightly-woke games. I'd much rather refund it, but unfortunately I had took my time a little too much so that's not an option anymore.
I like management-type games. This one really pulled me in. Played it for a few hours right off the bat. Didn't get bored, so well worth it.

Great remake of Theme Hospital, it sucks it doesn't have native controller support on the PC, the janitors don't have priority sliders (a downgrade from Theme Hospital), and they're dumb. They leave tasks unfinished "looking for work". You need to tell them constantly what to do. I feel I'm more of governance/maintenance manager than hospital owner, honestly.
Nice Clone of the Classic Theme Hospital.
idk what to say but it was good, if u like tycoons, then u'll like this game ig
this is a very entertaining game that has made me laugh many times
great game , nice gameplay , nostalgic 80's 90's game
it's an upgraded version of "theme hospital".
good game but very repetative
Just look at how many hours I have in this game....
Cool game - true to the original
Great game!
